column7:
Viable Titanic Choices
Chaser & Soul Imprint

column13: Even if Assembly offers meta options to obtain for free through missions, it's often slow to actually complete. You also want Job Change units, which require CL20. Opting to just do Titanic Growth for these units is often quicker.
World Boss is a good source of growth cubes btw

Example 1: While Edel is an option for Assembly and better than Sol, you want her at FSI to content. You can take Sol & just opt to complete Titanic Growth for Edel. (Some attributes don't have this option for certain classes, though)
silver knights will give you the rest of the cubes needed for FSI

Example 2: Callisto (T), Ai (T), & Mayden (T) can be obtained on your first or second day starting if you use Titanic Growth to CL20 their base counterparts. You would then have 4 meta units, rather than waiting on Assembly to have them unlocked
Make use of all heroes to your advatage!

column7:
Example of 
Titanic Growth Only WB
column13: There are three TGs: Chaser, Soul Imprint, & Spirit. Use both to reach CL25 SI10 D5 if the unit is available then finish Soul Imprint with Hero Exclusive Growth cubes. Spirit needs to be grinded for w/ dailies & content
